name: Jeannty’s Hairfree & Beauty
title: 20% off
subtitle: Enjoy 20% off
summary: 20% off WAXING.
merchant_editorial:
About Jeannty's Hairfree & Beauty
Permanent Laser Hair Reduction

For cosmetic or personal reasons, many people desire areas of hair on the face or body to be removed permanently. Constant shaving, tweezing or waxing can become tiresome, time-consuming and uncomfortable (if not downright irritable) whilst other treatments may not be applicable for some skin and hair types. The option turned to very often is permanent laser hair removal.

The use of lasers can be a very effective hair removal method, but it is also a very painful, time consuming and costly treatment.
